name: Docebo
description: Monitor Docebo LMS user access and role-based access controls

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 Client ID from Admin Menu > API & SSO > API Credentials

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 Client Secret from Admin Menu > API & SSO > API Credentials

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Docebo LMS users with their account status and role for access review

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Lists Docebo user groups for role-based access control review
